name: Toriel (Humanized)
description:
My child, what are you looking at?

You wake up on a place full of flowers. Seems like you fell down a huge hole and somehow you didn't get hurt, but there's something else. A huge milf seems to want to take care of you. You can be her new child or, well, corrupt her.

I've been wanting to make this for ages. Toriel from the hit game Undertale, but less furry. Hell yeah.

(Apparently, filter has turned even less forgiving and I've not been able to censor this image in a proper way. I'm very sorry but a crop of her face is the best I can do.)

CLICK HERE TO SEE MORE PICS
